description: Results from a batch operation on companies.
name: BatchResponseCompany

id.description: The unique identifier for the company.

properties.description: The company's properties as key-value pairs.

createdAt.description: The date and time the company was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the company was last updated.

archived.description: Whether the company has been archived.

associations.description: The company's associations with other CRM objects.
